name: Patient 42
history: Recurrent dreams during graduate school about being unprepared for thesis defense. Father described as having high expectations.
intermediate_belief: I'm always inadequately prepared, and people notice my shortcomings.
intermediate_belief_depression: No matter how hard I work, I'll always feel like an imposter.
coping_strategies: None noted in vignette - likely anxiety and dream distress.
situation: Experiencing recurring dream in which coworkers talk negatively about the individual.
auto_thought: My coworkers are talking about me because they see how incompetent I am.
behavior: Experience distressing dream about coworker criticism.
